attributes.title: Charming Beachfront Cottage in Santa Monica
attributes.description:
Wake up to stunning ocean views in this beautifully renovated cottage just steps from the beach. Enjoy the California sunshine on your private deck, take a short stroll to the iconic Santa Monica Pier, or explore the vibrant Third Street Promenade.

The space features an open-plan living area with vaulted ceilings, a fully equipped gourmet kitchen, and three cozy bedrooms decorated in a coastal style. Perfect for families or groups of friends looking for a memorable California getaway.
